title: GoldenMaus's Titanium Tools
description: A lightweight expansion introducing Titanium — the perfect step between Diamond and Netherite.
body:
# 🔩 GoldenMaus's titanium tools
_A lightweight expansion introducing Titanium — the perfect step between Diamond and Netherite._

## 🧱 What This Mod Adds
GoldenMaus's titanium tools is a minimalistic, self-contained mod that introduces a new high-tier metal into Minecraft: Titanium. You can make titanium tools and armor, even use it as a beacon base.

## 🔍 Titanium Ore
### Generation Range:

Spawns in the Overworld between Y-levels -63 and -32

### Harvesting Requirements:

Requires at least a Diamond Pickaxe or stronger to mine

Mining with lower-tier tools will destroy the block

### Ore Design:

Naturally integrated into vanilla-like generation

Found only in deepslate.

## 🔥 Smelting & Crafting
Smelt Titanium Ore into Titanium Ingots using a furnace or blast furnace.

**Titanium Ingots are used to craft:**

Full Toolset (Pickaxe, Axe, Shovel, Hoe, Sword)

Full Armor Set (Helmet, Chestplate, Leggings, Boots)

## 🛡️ Titanium Gear Stats
Titanium gear is placed between Diamond and Netherite in terms of durability, damage, efficiency, and armor value.

### ⚔️ Tools:
- More durable and faster than Diamond
- Less powerful than Netherite, making it a balanced stepping stone for progression
- Fully compatible with vanilla enchantments

### 🛡️ Armor:
- Stronger protection than Diamond
- Ideal for players who want an upgrade without the grind of Netherite

## 🔗 Mod Integration & Tags
All items, tools, armor, blocks, and ingots are fully tagged using Minecraft's standard and Forge tag systems for:

- Ore dictionary (forge:ores, forge:ingots, forge:storage_blocks, etc.)
- Tool material types (forge:tools/pickaxe, etc.)
- Armor material categories
- Compatible with datapacks, automation systems, and modded recipes
  
**This ensures full support for:**
- Modpacks
- Automation mods
- Crafting tweaks
- Loot table extensions
- Third-party recipe integration

## ⚙️ Technical & Compatibility

- Lightweight, no external dependencies
- Safe to add to existing worlds (new ore spawns in unexplored chunks)
- Fully self-contained: no worldgen conflicts, no intrusive gameplay changes

## 🧭 Ideal For:

- Modpack creators seeking a lightweight and balanced progression mod
- Players who want enhanced mining rewards without overhauling core gameplay
